items.title: Sabalenka: Boycott likely to 'fight for our rights'
items.summary: Aryna Sabalenka said Tuesday that a boycott might be needed for players to get a bigger share of Slam revenues, and players such as Coco Gauff and Elena Rybakina agreed.
